name: dataflou-compositor
description: OSC + MIDI scene compositor - Modulation 2 -> Sequencer (Rate->bpm, Shape->per-mode personality knob, Depth->genAmount generative wildness), drop-focus fixes in Inspector inputs (live-overlay clobber + drag-drop blur theft), Hardware Mode session persistence, Modulation 1 relabel, Gesture modulator (XY recorder with live crayon + animated playhead, Wiggle, Forward / Backward / Ping-Pong playback), Stage-2 Address sub-mode (Modulation 2 drives the playhead), every modulator type usable as Modulation 2 (LFO / S&H / Slew / Chaos / Strange Attractor / Envelope / Random / Ramp / Arpeggiator), Two-stage modulator with live overlay of effective values on the Inspector controls, Modulation 2 Routing matrix column, Strange Attractor modulator (Lorenz / Aizawa / Thomas / Rössler / Rössler-4D / Lü-4D), Address sequencer mode, Scaling PRE/POST switch, editable pinned values broadcast to clips, per-slot Delay + Variation, Distribution knob on Random + S&H, Hardware Mode (catch-mode soft-takeover from physical controllers), per-sequence-slot duration / follow-action overrides, velocity humanize with live-rolling display, modulator-driven note-edge MIDI retrigger, Learned MIDI panel with inline binding editor, drag-reorder scenes, configurable MIDI note window, pitch-snap with 26 scales, native MIDI output, Capture, OSC fan-out forward, per-arg pin + per-arg scaling, undo/redo, save-on-quit, per-session GUI layout, Pool + Scene libraries, 10 sequencer modes, generative system, 10 modulators, rich themes
author: Vincent Fillion
